channel.title: xss on tnychn
channel.description: Recent content in xss on tnychn

item.title: HKCERT CTF 2021: 純孩兒 BabyXSS
item.description: This post is part of the HKCERT 2021 CTF series. Name 純孩兒 (BabyXSS) Tags web Points 100 Difficulty ★☆☆☆☆ Solves 37 (total of all four divisions) Release Date 2021-11-13 02:00:00 Have you tried the infant XSS challenge in the training platform? If you did, then you can try out this BABY XSS CHALLENGE…
